channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 29, 2026
item.description: From the global stage to the latest in technological advancements, significant developments are shaping our world today. We begin with reports indicating the United States and Iran are nearing a ceasefire extension, even as recent military strikes un...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 28, 2026
item.description: You are listening to "The VENCAst," your daily briefing on global events, European developments, and the latest in science and technology. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, and today is Thursday, May 28, 2026. On today's program, we wil...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 27, 2026
item.description: From the ongoing escalation in the Middle East, where Israel expands ground operations in Lebanon and new US airstrikes threaten a fragile ceasefire with Iran, to renewed Russian threats against Kyiv and a critical AI vulnerability impacting millions...
